title: BigBear.ai Holdings Stock Analysis: Analysts Forecast Over 30% Upside
text: BigBear.ai Holdings stock analysis indicating analysts forecast over 30% upside potential. Post-Q1 earnings analysis from Globe and Mail shows analyst consensus seeing significant upside opportunity at current price levels. The analysis focuses on the company's strong backlog position, defense AI market tailwinds, and potential for the stock to re-rate higher as profitability metrics improve.
